text_input: Write a cover letter for: Flutter Developer Intern at Groww | Remote. Candidate: Aditya Lohar, B.Tech CSE DBATU 2027, skills Flutter React Node.js MongoDB Python, projects: CrazyXAni (anime streaming), Krushi Mitra (AI farming app), achievement: Top 800/31000+ Meta PyTorch Hackathon
output:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm Aditya Lohar, a final-year B.Tech Computer Engineering student at KBSCOE Jalgaon (DBATU, 2027), applying for the Flutter Developer Intern role at Groww.

Flutter is my primary framework — I've used it to build production-grade mobile applications with Riverpod for state management and Firebase for backend. My project Krushi Mitra, an AI-powered farming app, was built in Flutter and presented at the FAR AWAY Hackathon 2026.

I also ranked in the top 800 of 31,000+ participants at the Meta PyTorch OpenEnv Hackathon, which reflects my ability to perform under competitive conditions.

I'm available immediately and excited to contribute to Groww's mission.

Regards,
Aditya Lohar
GitHub: github.com/Adityaloharaa0030

output:

text_input: Write a cover letter for: Full Stack MERN Intern at Startup | Remote. Candidate: Aditya Lohar, B.Tech CSE DBATU 2027, skills Flutter React Next.js Node.js MongoDB Python, projects: CrazyXAni (anime streaming with Node.js + MongoDB backend)
output:
Dear Hiring Manager,
